textByHash.560c13b96e3a2caa83dc2eb26a37cbdc57b040a9: I would prefer it if you didn't speak to me in such a manner. I'll have you know I'm an accomplished merchant.
textByHash.47691be210457bbf8cec1670e1b097b021d02701: Don't tell me to calm down! And don't call me 'junior'.
textByHash.0671c24c516d80bff2a8a20604633c9112024948: I'll have you know I am Farid Morrisane, son of Ali Morrisane, the world's greatest merchant!
textByHash.bbab223200b0cb440a7d664ef5e3066f13d7b4a5: My dad has given me the responsibility of expanding our business here.
textByHash.c91ea74ddebb06c74de6d1c801d480a48b1ef549: Look, mate - I may be young, I may be short, but I'm a respected merchant around here and don't have time to deal with simpletons like you.
textByHash.c8060b4bf3398145238713324ac3b91381e6b310: Look, darling - I may be young, I may be short, but I'm a respected merchant around here and don't have time to deal with simpletons like you.
textByHash.452378355e9fa21c277cf4a4273fbd168603dfe8: Then I shall not stop you, mister. I've too much work to do.
textByHash.8d519bed516899b219e97d650daee00a15f8c95a: Then I shall not stop you, miss. I've too much work to do.
textByHash.930763cf6967e551301cbdbd350596f76e9ff8fa: My father shall be so pleased.
textByHash.03af23e62429543e7767b919eb885a37e4fa1120: Hmm. If divide by 20 and take off 50%...
textByHash.10ec100c23f0c08400be91f5339393532839a127: I can make so much money here!
